transcript: For 535 calories and 46 grams of protein, this is impossible to pass up. I'm a weight loss dietician. This is one of my three favorite orders from Taco Bell. So I went with the Baja Blast Zero. It has 15 calories, I think. That's pretty good. And if y'all didn't know this, Taco Bell just came out with chicken nuggets. Yes, actual chicken nuggets. I mean, I really can't think of anywhere else that does chicken nuggets with macros like that. And then for the dipping sauce, I went with the house bell sauce because it's the lowest in calories. And then for some extra fiber, protein, and flavor, I went with the pintos and cheese. So let's give this thing a try without any sauces first. Bon Apple tea. It's definitely crispy and it's not overpowered with salt like most other fast food restaurants are. I mean, honestly, pretty good. I give it eight and a half out of 10. So let's try it with the sauce. Now that sauce is thick bone apple tea. I've never had the bell sauce before, but it really just tastes like a taco seasoning dip. Overall with the dip 9.25 out of 10 best sauce to dip it in those, the pintos and cheese. Shit. I need to get back in the gym and really honestly, it's because it's got the fiber, the protein and the flavor. So you really don't even need a sauce in my opinion. Bone apple tea. I mean, that's pretty good like that. 12 out of 10. Let's save the best for last. Bone apple tea. I give that an I don't know out of 10. I mean, all in all, I gotta say, I'm pretty impressed with these. You should definitely give these a try. Let me know what you think. Macros are listed out in the caption for you.
